name: k2hr3-app
description: K2HR3 Web Application is K2hdkc based Resource and Roles and policy Rules

scripts.help:
echo 'command list:
    npm run build
    npm run build:dbg
    npm run build:all
    npm run build:all:dbg
    npm run build:license
    npm run build:versionfile
    npm run build:typescript
    npm run build:webpack
    npm run build:webpack:dbg
    npm run build:webpack:fast
    npm run build:webpack:fast:dbg
    npm run deploy
    npm run deploy:dbg
    npm run clean
    npm run start
    npm run start:prod
    npm run start:production
    npm run start:prod:dbg
    npm run start:prod:debug
    npm run start:prod:debug:break
    npm run start:prod:debug:nobreak
    npm run start:dev
    npm run start:develop
    npm run start:dev:dbg
    npm run start:dev:debug
    npm run start:dev:debug:break
    npm run start:dev:debug:nobreak
    npm run stop
    npm run test
    npm run test:all
    npm run test:lint
    npm run test:lint:src
    npm run test:lint:demo
    npm run test:jest
    npm run test:jest:run
    npm run test:jest:update
    npm run test:jest:watch
'
scripts.build:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build' && npm run build:all && echo '-> [DONE] build
'
scripts.build:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:dbg' && npm run build:all:dbg && echo '-> [DONE] build:dbg
'
scripts.build:all:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:all' && npm run build:license && npm run build:versionfile && npm run build:typescript && npm run build:webpack && echo '-> [DONE] build:all
'
scripts.build:all:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:all:dbg' && npm run build:license && npm run build:versionfile && npm run build:typescript && npm run build:webpack:dbg && echo '-> [DONE] build:all:dbg
'
scripts.build:license:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:license' && bin/build_all_licenses && echo '-> [DONE] build:license
'
scripts.build:versionfile:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:versionfile' && bin/build_version_file.sh && echo '-> [DONE] build:versionfile
'
scripts.build:typescript:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:typescript' && tsc && if [ -f dist/bin/www.js ]; then chmod +x dist/bin/www.js; fi && echo '-> [DONE] build:typescript
'
scripts.build:webpack:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:webpack' && webpack --config webpack.config.js --progress --mode production && echo '-> [DONE] build:webpack
'
scripts.build:webpack:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:webpack:dbg' && NODE_ENV=development webpack --config webpack.config.js --progress --mode development && echo '-> [DONE] build:webpack:dbg
'
scripts.build:webpack:fast:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:webpack:fast' && npm run build:typescript && if [ ! -f src/util/r3licenses.ts ]; then npm run build:license; fi && if [ ! -f src/util/r3version.ts ]; then npm run build:versionfile; fi && npm run build:webpack && echo '-> [DONE] build:webpack:fast
'
scripts.build:webpack:fast:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] build:webpack:fast:dbg' && npm run build:typescript && if [ ! -f src/util/r3licenses.ts ]; then npm run build:license; fi && if [ ! -f src/util/r3version.ts ]; then npm run build:versionfile; fi && npm run build:webpack:dbg && echo '-> [DONE] build:webpack:fast:dbg
'
scripts.deploy:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] deploy' && demo/demo_deploy.sh && echo '-> [DONE] deploy
'
scripts.deploy:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] deploy:dbg' && demo/demo_deploy.sh --debug_package --wihtout_license_file && echo '-> [DONE] deploy:dbg
'
scripts.clean:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] clean' && if [ -d public/js ]; then rm -rf public/js/bundle.js public/js/bundle.js.LICENSE.txt >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && if [ -d dist ]; then rm -rf dist/* >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && if [ -f src/util/r3licenses.ts ]; then rm -f src/util/r3licenses.ts >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && if [ -f src/util/r3version.ts ]; then rm -f src/util/r3version.ts >/dev/null 2>&1; fi && echo '-> [DONE] clean
'
scripts.start:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start' && npm run start:production && echo '-> [DONE] start
'
scripts.start:prod:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod' && npm run start:production && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod
'
scripts.start:production:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:production' && bin/run.sh -bg --production && echo '-> [DONE] start:production
'
scripts.start:prod:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:dbg' && npm run start:prod:debug && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:dbg
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug' && npm run start:prod:debug:break && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:break:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug:break' && bin/run.sh --production --debug && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug:break
'
scripts.start:prod:debug:nobreak:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:prod:debug:nobreak' && bin/run.sh --production --debug-nobrk && echo '-> [DONE] start:prod:debug:nobreak
'
scripts.start:dev:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:dev' && npm run start:develop && echo '-> [DONE] start:dev
'
scripts.start:develop:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:develop' && bin/run.sh -bg --development && echo '-> [DONE] start:develop
'
scripts.start:dev:dbg:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:dev:dbg' && npm run start:dev:debug && echo '-> [DONE] start:dev:dbg
'
scripts.start:dev:debug:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:dev:debug' && npm run start:dev:debug:break && echo '-> [DONE] start:dev:debug
'
scripts.start:dev:debug:break:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:dev:debug:break' && bin/run.sh --development --debug && echo '-> [DONE] start:dev:debug:break
'
scripts.start:dev:debug:nobreak:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] start:dev:debug:nobreak' && bin/run.sh --development --debug-nobrk && echo '-> [DONE] start:dev:debug:nobreak
'
scripts.stop:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] stop' && bin/run.sh --stop && echo '-> [DONE] stop
'
scripts.test:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test' && npm run test:all && echo '-> [DONE] test
'
scripts.test:all:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:all' && npm run test:lint && npm run test:jest && echo '-> [DONE] test:all
'
scripts.test:lint:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:lint' && npm run test:lint:src && npm run test:lint:demo && echo '-> [DONE] test:lint
'
scripts.test:lint:src:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:lint:src' && eslint webpack.config.js src/**/*.ts src/**/*.tsx && echo '-> [DONE] test:lint:src
'
scripts.test:lint:demo:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:lint:demo' && eslint demo/*.ts && echo '-> [DONE] test:lint:demo
'
scripts.test:jest:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:jest' && npm run test:jest:run && echo '-> [DONE] test:jest
'
scripts.test:jest:run:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:jest:run' && jest --env=jsdom --silent && echo '-> [DONE] test:jest:run
'
scripts.test:jest:update:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:jest:update' && jest --env=jsdom --updateSnapshot --silent && echo '-> [DONE] test:jest:update
'
scripts.test:jest:watch:
export NPM_CONFIG_LOGLEVEL=silent && echo '[START] test:jest:watch' && jest --env=jsdom --watch --silent && echo '-> [DONE] test:jest:watch
'

author: Takeshi Nakatani <ggtakec@gmail.com> (https://github.com/ggtakec)
